title: Executive Order 5205—Authorizing the Appointment of Erwin G. May Without Regard to Civil Service Rules
text:
Mr. Erwin G. May may be appointed to the position of Assistant Customs Agent, for ultimate assignment to Berlin, Germany, without regard to the competitive requirements of the Civil Service Act and Rules.
This order is recommended by the Secretary of the Treasury, the Civil Service Commission concurring.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
October 9, 1929.
